---
title: "My Publications"
listing:
  - id: pubs
    template: _ejs/publications.ejs
    contents: publications/**/*.qmd
    sort: "year desc"
    page-size: 30
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [title, journ, author,url_source,year]
    field-types:
      author: string
page-layout: full
---

<hr>

::: {#pubs}
:::
